testcase.name: test_download_success

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == '31.1.0' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfeecdc24ea80>('version') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfeecdc24ea80> = {}.get

testcase.name: test_apply_subadmin_returns_403
test_apply_master_success_and_marker
test_apply_nothing_staged_returns_409
test_apply_staged_bundle_missing_returns_409
test_launcher_prints_installed_ver_and_pending_apply

failure.message:
AssertionError: [launcher] backend_dir = /app/backend [launcher] listen = 127.0.0.1:8001 [launcher] native_mode = 1 [launcher] setup_complete= True [launcher] instance_id = ae2377a1-ec02-4b5a-941c-ebadaf7fe5ab [launcher] paths = {'data_root': '/app/backend/native/data', 'local_trivia': '/app/backend/native/data/trivia', 'assets': '/app/backend/native/data/assets', 'generated': '/app/backend/native/data/generated'} [launcher] static_bundle = /app/backend/static (present=True) [launcher] installed_ver = 32.0.0-alpha.11 [launcher] pending_apply= 31.1.0 (scheduled 2026-06-21T12:52:30.712836+00:00)
assert 'installed_ver = 31.0.0' in "[launcher] backend_dir = /app/backend
[launcher] listen = 127.0.0.1:8001
[launcher] native_mode = 1
[launcher] setup_complete= True
[launcher] instance_id = ae2377a1-ec02-4b5a-941c-ebadaf7fe5ab
[launcher] paths = {'data_root': '/app/backend/native/data', 'local_trivia': '/app/backend/native/data/trivia', 'assets': '/app/backend/native/data/assets', 'generated': '/app/backend/native/data/generated'}
[launcher] static_bundle = /app/backend/static (present=True)
[launcher] installed_ver = 32.0.0-alpha.11
[launcher] pending_apply= 31.1.0 (scheduled 2026-06-21T12:52:30.712836+00:00)
"

testcase.failure:
E AssertionError: [launcher] backend_dir = /app/backend [launcher] listen = 127.0.0.1:8001 [launcher] native_mode = 1 [launcher] setup_complete= True [launcher] instance_id = ae2377a1-ec02-4b5a-941c-ebadaf7fe5ab [launcher] paths = {'data_root': '/app/backend/native/data', 'local_trivia': '/app/backend/native/data/trivia', 'assets': '/app/backend/native/data/assets', 'generated': '/app/backend/native/data/generated'} [launcher] static_bundle = /app/backend/static (present=True) [launcher] installed_ver = 32.0.0-alpha.11 [launcher] pending_apply= 31.1.0 (scheduled 2026-06-21T12:52:30.712836+00:00)

"
